	ConstantProductAMM.reserve1 (src/amm/ConstantProductAMM.sol#23-24) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ConstantProductAMM.getReserves() (src/amm/ConstantProductAMM.sol#48-52)
	- ConstantProductAMM.reserve1 (src/amm/ConstantProductAMM.sol#23-24)
	- reserve1 = reserveIn + amountIn (src/amm/ConstantProductAMM.sol#129-130)
	ConstantProductAMM.reserve1 (src/amm/ConstantProductAMM.sol#23-24) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
